case_title: ROSADO, ANGELA VS GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORATION DIST. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSADO, ANGELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORATION DIST. JOHN GLENN ADJUSTERS DEFENDANTS GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & WENDELL MCREYNOLDS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSADO, ANGELA HEARING SET FOR FEB-10-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORATION DIST. JOHN GLENN ADJUSTERS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY ROSADO, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORATION DIST. JOHN GLENN ADJUSTERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERT MAIL SENT TO ANY AUTH. AGENT JOHN GLENN ADJUSTERS RETURNED SIGNED
CERT MAIL SENT TO ANY AUTH. AGENT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION RETURNED SIGNED
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-10-2003, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSADO, ANGELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORATION DIST. $847.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $847.00, DEFT'S NOTICE OF 8/19/02 WAS MISLEADING & DID NOT CLEARLY INDICATE PLTF NEEDED TO FILE A CLAIM.THE CONFUSION WAS THE RESULT IN PART TO PLTF'S IST LANGUAGE BEING SPANISH, & ALSO THE TENDERING OF A RELEASE. SEE: JOHN R.V. OAKLAND UNIF. SCHOOL DIST. 48 CAL 3D 445;256 CAL RPTR 769.JOHN GLEN ADJUSTERS PREVAILED.PLTF FAILED TO PROVE A CASE AGAINST IT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
